title: Implement SSO/SAML integration for enterprise onboarding
description: Enterprise prospects require SSO via SAML 2.0 and OIDC before signing contracts. Current authentication only supports email/password. Need to integrate with Okta, Azure AD, and OneLogin. Must support IdP-initiated and SP-initiated flows with JIT provisioning.

title: Multi-tenant data isolation audit and remediation
description: Security audit flagged that tenant data isolation relies on application-level row filtering rather than schema or database-level separation. Two Fortune-500 prospects require SOC 2 Type II compliance before procurement approval. Need to evaluate and implement proper isolation boundaries.

title: Role-based access control with custom permission sets
description: Enterprise customers need fine-grained RBAC beyond our current admin/member/viewer model. Requirements include custom role definitions, permission inheritance, resource-level access controls, and audit logging of all permission changes.

title: Data residency controls for EU and APAC regions
description: GDPR and data sovereignty requirements mean enterprise customers must choose where their data is stored. Need to implement region-pinned storage with cross-region replication disabled by default. Affects database, file storage, and search indices.

title: White-label theming and custom domain support
description: Three enterprise prospects require white-label branding with custom logos, color schemes, and domain names (app.customer.com). Current architecture serves all tenants from a single domain and shared asset pipeline.
